subtitles.original: キラッと光る犬歯がお似合いの口が物語る
subtitles.english: A mouth adorned with a sparkling canine tooth tells a tale

subtitles.original: リリカルがもくもくと充満し織り成すスモーキーなストーリー
subtitles.english: Lyricals billow and fill the air, weaving a smoky story

subtitles.original: Let me see
subtitles.english: Let me see

subtitles.original: 不確かな平穏と確かな不安を纏い彷徨う
subtitles.english: Clad in uncertain peace and certain anxiety, I wander

subtitles.original: お飾りにゃないことに恐れ戦く
subtitles.english: Shuddering with fear that it's no mere decoration

subtitles.original: 十色の価値観 騒ぐラジカル 何がはじまる？
subtitles.english: Ten-colored values, a noisy radical, what is about to begin?

subtitles.original: 不器用な生き様に心弾む (Ahh)
subtitles.english: My heart leaps at this clumsy way of life (Ahh)

subtitles.original: I wonder why 理性を欠いたサバイブ 願っても願ってもなくならない
subtitles.english: I wonder why, a survival devoid of reason; no matter how much I wish, it won't disappear

subtitles.original: I wonder why 危険度ハイなマイライフ Do it again, do it again (Yes)
subtitles.english: I wonder why, my highly dangerous life; do it again, do it again (Yes)

subtitles.original: Chase, chase, where is my utopia こじ開ける扉 Viva 現状打破なら飛び乗りな
subtitles.english: Chase, chase, where is my utopia; prying open the door, viva, if it's breaking the status quo, jump on board

subtitles.original: くしゃくしゃの紙屑に傷ついたハート重ねる しわついたまま時を刻む (踊れ)
subtitles.english: Layering my wounded heart on crumpled scrap paper, ticking away time while still wrinkled (Dance)

subtitles.original: 数多のお目目から逃げた Back in the day ひた隠しているファンキーなヘッド
subtitles.english: Fled from countless eyes back in the day, keeping this funky head hidden deep down

subtitles.original: 個性の延長線上にあるギフトも誰かにとってはバグみたい
subtitles.english: Even the gift on the extension of individuality seems like a bug to someone else

subtitles.original: 伏し目をそらし 行くあてもない
subtitles.english: Averting my downcast eyes, with nowhere to go

subtitles.original: 現状 感情 洗浄 出来ず立ち往生
subtitles.english: Unable to wash away current emotions, standing at a standstill

subtitles.original: 抱いても泣いても足掻いても Fall, fall, fall, fall
subtitles.english: Whether I embrace, cry, or struggle, I fall, fall, fall, fall

subtitles.original: Uhh 放浪 噛み締めて揺蕩う
subtitles.english: Uhh, contemplating my wandering, I sway

subtitles.original: Hey don't panic, Go too far far far 一歩前に踏み出す アニマル
subtitles.english: Hey, don't panic, go too far, far, far; taking a step forward, animal

subtitles.original: (aww) Hey don't panic, Go too far far far
subtitles.english: (Aww) Hey, don't panic, go too far, far, far

subtitles.original: 一丁前に 超前に 超前に (Straight out)
subtitles.english: Acting like a big shot, way ahead, way ahead (Straight out)
